patterns: What medicines can I buy to help me with my common cold?
tell me some prevention method from common cold
What should I eat or drink if i am suffering from common cold?
How can I keep from getting a cold or the flu?
responses: Medicines: Dextromethorphan, Decongestant, Diphenhydramine, Crocin Cold & Flu Max. Preventions: Wash your hands, Avoid touching your face, Clean frequently used surfaces, Use hand sanitizers. Suggested foods: Garlic, Vitamin C-rich fruits, Leafy greens, Broccoli, Oatmeal, Chicken Soup.

patterns: What medicines can I buy to help me with my fever?
tell me some prevention method from fever
What should I eat or drink if i am suffering from fever?
How can I keep from getting a fever?
responses: Medicines: acetaminophen, ibuprofen, aspirin, Crocin Cold & Flu Max. Preventions: Wash your hands, Cover your mouth when you cough, Clean frequently used surfaces. Suggested foods: Garlic, Vitamin C-rich fruits, Leafy greens, Broccoli, Oatmeal, Chicken Soup.

patterns: What medicines can I buy to help me with my diabetes?
tell me some prevention method from diabetes
What should I eat or drink if i am suffering from diabetes?
How can I keep from getting diabetes?
responses: Medicines: Insulin, Amylinomimetic drug, DPP-4 inhibitors. Preventions: Cut Sugar and Refined Carbs, Work Out Regularly, Drink Water, Lose Weight, Quit Smoking, Watch Portion Sizes. Suggested foods: Leafy greens, Avocados, Eggs.

patterns: What medicines can I buy to help me with my depression?
tell me some prevention method from depression
What should I eat or drink if i am suffering from depression?
How can I keep from getting depression?
responses: Medicines: brexpiprazole, quetiapine, olanzapine. Preventions: Exercise regularly, Cut back on social media, Drink Water, Build strong relationships. Suggested foods: Vitamin D, Omega-3 Fatty Acids, Beans and legumes.

patterns: What medicines can I buy to help me with my asthma?
tell me some prevention method from asthma
What should I eat or drink if i am suffering from asthma?
How can I keep from getting asthma?
responses: Medicines: epinephrine, anticholinergic, ProAir HFA. Preventions: Identify Asthma Triggers, Stay Away From Allergens, Avoid Smoke. Suggested foods: carrots, juice, eggs, broccoli, cantaloupe, milk.

patterns: what medicines can i buy for headache
responses: Medicines: ibuprofen, acetaminophen, sumatriptan (for migraine). Preventions: Stay hydrated, Get enough sleep, Manage stress, Limit screen time, Avoid skipping meals. Suggested foods: Almonds, Spinach, Watermelon, Ginger tea.

Medicines: cetirizine, loratadine, diphenhydramine (Benadryl). Preventions: Avoid allergens, Keep windows closed during pollen season, Use HEPA filters, Wash bedding regularly. Suggested foods: Local honey, Ginger, Turmeric, Citrus fruits.

patterns: what medicines for high blood pressure
responses: Medicines: ACE inhibitors, beta blockers, diuretics (consult doctor first). Preventions: Reduce salt intake, Exercise regularly, Maintain healthy weight, Limit alcohol, Manage stress, Quit smoking. Suggested foods: Bananas, Berries, Beetroot, Oats, Leafy greens, Garlic.

Preventions: Get vaccinated, Wear a mask in crowded places, Wash hands frequently, Maintain social distancing, Avoid touching face. If symptomatic: Isolate, get tested, consult a doctor for antivirals like Paxlovid. Suggested foods: Vitamin C, Vitamin D, Zinc-rich foods, Plenty of fluids.

Medicines: oseltamivir (Tamiflu), zanamivir, acetaminophen. Preventions: Get a yearly flu shot, Wash hands, Avoid close contact with sick people. Suggested foods: Chicken soup, Garlic, Ginger, Vitamin C-rich fruits.

Medicines: SSRIs (sertraline, fluoxetine), benzodiazepines (short-term, doctor's advice only). Preventions: Practice deep breathing, Regular exercise, Limit caffeine and alcohol, Get enough sleep, Try meditation. Suggested foods: Salmon, Chamomile tea, Dark chocolate, Yogurt, Green tea.

Medicines: antacids (Tums, Rolaids), omeprazole, simethicone for gas. Preventions: Eat smaller meals, Avoid spicy/fried food, Don't lie down right after eating, Stay hydrated, Limit alcohol. Suggested foods: Bananas, Plain rice, Toast, Yogurt, Ginger tea.
